positions.title: Data Scientist
positions.description: Owning a churn intelligence platform end-to-end — ingestion, features, training, real-time inference, and monitoring — and shipping ML into CRM and marketing stacks for downstream personalization.
achievements: Built and scaled a churn intelligence platform processing 500K+ records daily across the full pipeline.
Cut churn prediction latency 40% by re-engineering batch jobs into event-driven streaming for sub-second scoring.
Deployed an XGBoost propensity model on behavioral signals — A/B tested and productionized in 6 weeks, lifting lead conversion 18%.
Applied K-Means and hierarchical clustering on 2M+ subscribers, lifting retention 11% via targeted campaigns.
Integrated ML outputs into CRM and marketing systems via REST APIs, powering real-time personalization for 3 downstream teams.
Built a data quality framework (schema validation, anomaly detection, drift monitoring) that cut quality incidents 35% and saved 6+ hrs/week.
Stood up CI/CD for ML deployment with automated tests and rollback — 94% test coverage, zero critical regressions.
Built Power BI dashboards and mentored 3 analysts; iteration cycle dropped from 2 weeks to 4 days.

positions.title: Data Scientist / ML Engineer
positions.description: Built ETL and ML systems for enterprise clients — ticket-routing NLP, loan-risk scoring, and modular feature pipelines that compressed retraining cycles from weeks to days.
achievements: Built scalable Spark/Databricks ETL pipelines across 8+ data sources with schema-drift detection, cutting manual effort 60%.
Optimized batch workflows to drop training/execution time 30% — from 8 hours to under 3.
Developed and deployed an NLP ticket-routing model at 87% accuracy, reducing average resolution time by 2.1 days.
Shipped a loan-risk scoring system using logistic regression and gradient boosting at 91% AUC-ROC, cutting underwriting effort 45%.
Automated loan-approval routing with real-time scoring — eliminated manual triage and saved ~$120K/year.
Built modular feature-engineering pipelines with validation gates; retraining cycle dropped from 3 weeks to 4 days.
Partnered cross-functionally across data prep, modeling, and deployment to deliver end-to-end solutions.

positions.title: Data Analyst
positions.description: Built the analytics foundation: unified data warehouse, behavioral analytics on lead flows, and reporting/automation that gave the business its first reliable daily picture of performance.
achievements: Integrated 6+ data sources into a unified warehouse for centralized analytics and reporting.
Designed behavioral analytics on web-to-lead data, lifting qualified-lead generation 30%.
Ran EDA and cohort analysis to surface high-value customer segments for marketing and sales.
Built Tableau and Power BI dashboards for KPI tracking, improving business efficiency 12%.
Automated reporting workflows with Python and SQL, saving 8+ hrs/week of manual effort.
Translated stakeholder requirements into data-driven insights to support cross-team decisions.
